name: Nassour, Isabella
evidence: No public record of an Isabella Nassour in Austin could be found — no LinkedIn, news, roster or professional listing. The only basis for the classification is her own self-reported occupation ('student') on the filing, which is why confidence is low. Nassour is an established name in the 78746 / West Lake Hills area she gave from (Keel & Nassour LLP and Nassour Property Tax Consultants both sit at 3839 Bee Cave Rd, 78746, and a Jason Nassour Family Partnership is registered at a 78746 address), but no source connects her to that family and it is not assumed here. A single $450 gift to Kirk Watson in October 2022 with no FEC history.

name: Ford, Ian
resolved_employer: EBG (Entertainment Benefits Group) — Head of Innovation and Development, EBG Labs; founder and former CEO of Undercover Tourist
evidence: Ian Ford founded Undercover Tourist in 2000 and ran it as CEO — an online travel agency selling discounted theme-park and attraction tickets, headquartered in Austin. EBG (formerly Entertainment Benefits Group, a CAA portfolio company) acquired Undercover Tourist in June 2022, and Ford moved over to head innovation and development at EBG Labs, a new unit within the group; he is listed at EBG Labs in Austin. That matches the self-reported 'Executive / EBG' and the Austin 78735 address exactly, and his Vistage membership is in the Austin chapter. Classified Hospitality / Events on the travel and attraction-ticket business; Entertainment or Technology would be defensible readings of the same company. BSc in biotechnology, London South Bank University.

name: Petri, Zahra
evidence: Zahra Petri is listed as a Designer on the team page of Laura Burton Interiors, an Austin full-service interior architecture firm doing residential, commercial and multifamily design and remodeling. Her firm bio records fifteen years in the corporate world before she moved into interior design, first with a local Austin designer and then as a project manager for a custom home builder. Matches the self-reported 'Interior Design / Laura Burton Interiors' and the Austin 78704 address.

name: Ryan, Reid
resolved_employer: Ryan-Sanders Baseball, Inc. (RSB) — CEO and co-owner
evidence: Reid Ryan is CEO of Ryan-Sanders Baseball Inc. — the initials 'RSB' he self-reported — which owns the Round Rock Express. He co-founded RSB in 1998 with his father, Hall of Fame pitcher Nolan Ryan, and Houston businessman Don Sanders, and co-owns it with Nolan, his brother Reese and Sanders. He was president of the Houston Astros from May 2013 until he was reassigned in November 2019, returning to RSB as CEO in 2020, which accounts for the Houston 77057 address on this 2024 gift. He also sits on the Major League Baseball board of trustees. No AIPAC, pro-Israel, oil & gas, gun-lobby or defense affiliations surfaced.

affiliations.org: Ryan-Sanders Baseball, Inc. / Round Rock Express

name: Ali, Kauser
resolved_employer: Escarpment Enterprises, Inc. (Austin) — line of business could not be determined
evidence: The person is corroborated: public records place a Kauser Ali at 14309 Broadwinged Hawk Dr, Austin, TX 78738 — matching the donor's 78738 zip — and a 2018 City of Austin campaign-finance report already lists a Kauser Ali as an agent for 'Escarpent Enterprises', the same employer reported here. What could not be established is the employer itself: no Texas registration, website, directory listing or news mention of 'Escarpment Enterprises, Inc.' was found (the similarly named Escarpment Construction and Escarpment Hospitality LLC are different entities with no shown connection). The Retail label rests only on her self-reported 'Cashier' occupation, not on any knowledge of what the company does, hence low confidence.

name: Boyd, Benny
resolved_employer: Benny Boyd Auto Group / Benny Boyd, Ltd. — President
evidence: Benny Boyd is president of the Benny Boyd auto dealerships, a Chrysler-Dodge-Jeep-Ram group headquartered in Lampasas since January 1994 with locations in Copperas Cove, Marble Falls, Bastrop and Andrews; the BBB profile for the dealership lists 'Benny Boyd, Ltd' as an alternate business name — the exact employer string reported — and Mr. Benny Boyd as president. Two generations run the business (it was started by Benny Boyd Sr. and his son Benny Boyd Jr.), and nothing found distinguishes which one gave; both are auto dealers, so the Retail classification holds either way. Held at medium because the downtown Austin 78701 zip on the gift does not match the Lampasas base of the business and could not be tied to either man. Republican-leaning federal giving (50 FEC contributions, lean 0.0).

name: Taylor, Randy
evidence: Randy Taylor has been Chairman and CEO of Pinnergy since 2003, an Austin-headquartered diversified energy services company operating since 1992 across Texas, Louisiana, New Mexico and Oklahoma — fluids management, waste disposal, water transfer, conductor and surface casing drilling and environmental services in the Permian Basin, Haynesville Shale and Barnett Shale, and one of the largest independent oilfield service companies in its industry. He is a CPA who began at Deloitte & Touche and holds a BBA with Honors in Accounting from UT Austin. Matches the self-reported 'Executive / Pinnergy' and the Austin 78746 address; corporate records list him as CEO of Pinnergy, Ltd. at an Austin address.

affiliations.role: Chairman & CEO since 2003 of one of the largest independent oilfield service companies in its segment, serving oil and gas operators in the Permian Basin, Haynesville and Barnett Shale. This is a direct oil & gas industry executive/owner role, not incidental employment.

affiliations.org: Gulf States Oil & Refining Company; Cavern Disposal; Pinnacle Potash International; Taylor Service Company; Taylor Invesco
affiliations.role: Prior leadership roles across energy, industrial and financial businesses, per his Pinnergy executive bio — Gulf States Oil & Refining is a further oil & gas connection.

name: Virgil, Allan
evidence: Could not identify this person. No Allan Virgil in Austin appears in LinkedIn, news, business directories or professional listings, and the self-reported employer 'Loop' is too generic to resolve — several unrelated Austin businesses use the name (The Loop Running Supply at 115 Sandra Muraida Way is in the donor's 78703 zip, and Loop1 is an Austin IT operations management firm), with no evidence tying him to any of them. One $450 gift to Kirk Watson in October 2022, no FEC history. Not classified rather than guess.

name: Kenyon, Marisala
resolved_employer: Barton Creek Country Club (Austin) — self-reported Manager
evidence: No public record of Marisala Kenyon could be found — she does not appear in the club's published management roster (Daniel Budzius is general manager) or in any LinkedIn, news or directory listing. The employer she reported is unambiguous, though: Barton Creek Country Club is a private club in southwest Austin, and the donor's 78735 zip is the Barton Creek zip, so she lives beside the club she says she manages for. Classified on the employer, which is certain, rather than on the person, who is not — hence medium. No FEC history.

name: Stout, Coleman
resolved_employer: Sand Separation Solutions, LLC (Midland, TX) — self-reported owner
evidence: Sand Separation Solutions, LLC is a Midland-based oilfield equipment company established in 2017 (3211 S County Rd 1180; ~8 employees, ~$5.4M revenue) that rents 5K and 10K cyclonic sand traps, sand filters, test separators and manifold packages to flowback companies in the Permian Basin — an exact match for the employer string he reported, and the only Texas company by that name. Business directories list the CEO only as 'J. Stout', which is consistent with a Coleman Stout who goes by a middle name but does not confirm it, and no LinkedIn or news profile for him was found. An unrelated Cole Stout (Spanish Moss Holdings) lives in Austin 78703, not this donor's 78731. Held at medium: the company is certain and his ownership claim fits it, but his identity is not independently corroborated beyond his own filing.

affiliations.role: Self-reported owner of a Permian Basin oilfield sand-separation equipment rental company. Recorded as an oil & gas ownership connection, but note the evidence is his own filing plus the company match — no independent source names him as owner.

name: Chen, Huiwen?
resolved_employer: USAA — Data Scientist (later Director, Data Science: Costs and Efficiency Optimization)
evidence: Huiwen 'Jocelyn' Chen is a data scientist at USAA based in Austin, TX, working on financial risk management, statistical modeling and AI/ML, with prior roles at Toyota North America, M&T Bank and the University of Michigan; she later shows as Director Data Scientist at USAA and more recently as a machine learning engineer with Disney Streaming via Optomi. All three reported details line up — name, USAA, and the Data Scientist title (the filing has occupation and employer transposed: 'USAA' sits in the occupation field and 'Data Scientist' in the employer field) — as does the Austin 78701 address. USAA is a member-owned insurance and banking group, hence Finance. Gave to Ryan Alter in November 2022; no FEC history.

name: Hunt, Woody
resolved_employer: Hunt Companies, Inc. — Controlling Shareholder and Chairman Emeritus of the Board
evidence: Woody L. Hunt (b. 1945) is Controlling Shareholder and Chairman Emeritus of the Board of Hunt Companies, Inc., the El Paso-headquartered family holding company founded in 1947 that invests in real estate, infrastructure and operating businesses and employs over 4,000 people; he took control as President and Chairman in 1977 after the firm repurchased its public stock. He is chairman of the Woody and Gayle Hunt Family Foundation, chairman emeritus and founding chairman of the Borderplex Alliance, and a prolific education philanthropist (the family foundation gave UTEP $25 million in 2022). The El Paso 79922 address and the self-reported 'Executive / Hunt Companies, Inc.' match; he is the father of Joshua Hunt, already recorded in this dataset at the same company. Heavy Republican-leaning federal giving (181 FEC contributions, lean 0.06).

affiliations.org: Hunt Military Communities (division of Hunt Companies, Inc.)
affiliations.role: No personal title in the division — but as controlling shareholder and chairman emeritus of the parent he owns and sits atop a business whose military-housing division is the largest provider of military housing in the U.S. under the Department of Defense's Military Housing Privatization Initiative, with an ownership interest in roughly 37,768 military homes across 20 states. This is privatized military family housing under DoD contract, not weapons or systems contracting. Same corporate connection recorded for Joshua Hunt, though the ownership link is more direct here.

affiliations.org: El Paso Electric (Nasdaq: EE) and PNM Resources (NYSE: PNM)
affiliations.role: Member, Board of Directors (both). Regulated electric utilities — noted for completeness on the energy side; these are not oil & gas companies and no oil & gas role for him was found.

affiliations.org: Woody and Gayle Hunt Family Foundation

affiliations.role: Founding chairman (2003) and chairman emeritus — El Paso-Juárez-Las Cruces regional economic development organization

affiliations.org: Texas Higher Education Foundation (trustee); UT MD Anderson Cancer Center Board of Visitors; American Business Immigration Coalition (board); Aspen Institute Conexion Program (advisory board); Council for Regional Economic Expansion and Educational Development (vice-chair)

affiliations.role: Co-founder (owner of the El Paso Chihuahuas and El Paso Locomotive FC)
